summary: Verified R rWrapper.override refactor, Python scientific stack, and Quarto installation are in place in configuration.nix and home.nix. All F8 verification tests pass: R P0/P1/P2 package loads, Python scipy/statsmodels/sklearn/seaborn/pyarrow imports, quarto check (markdown/Python/Jupyter/R/Knitr engines), and end-to-end qmd render.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary documenting R wrapper refactor, Python scientific stack, quarto install, and successful F8 verification results.
rWrapper.override block with P0/P1/P2 R packages (lines 522-543) and quarto in systemPackages (line 570).
Added scipy, statsmodels, seaborn, pyarrow (with block) and p.scikit-learn (dotted form) to python312.withPackages.

completion_data.completion_summary: Refactored R to use rWrapper.override with all P0/P1/P2 packages, added scipy/statsmodels/sklearn/seaborn/pyarrow to the Python environment, and installed Quarto system-wide. All runtime verification tests pass including end-to-end qmd render.
